title: King's Road — Full Game Content Pipeline
description: Comprehensive content authoring for King's Road: 6 anchor towns, 6 main quest chapters, 30+ side quests, 50+ NPCs, 20+ monsters, 40+ items, 30+ roadside features, encounter tables, and pacing config. All content validated by Zod schemas and consumed by the Engine v2 blueprint factory system.

stories.title: Pacing Configuration
stories.description: Create content/pacing/config.json defining walk/sprint speeds and all interval ranges (ambient, minor, major, quest micro/meso/macro, anchor). These pacing values govern how frequently encounters, features, and quests appear along the road. Use PacingConfigSchema.
acceptance_criteria: File content/pacing/config.json exists and passes PacingConfigSchema validation
Integration test validates config loads and all values in range

stories.title: Ashford Town Config — Verify & Complete
stories.description: Verify existing content/towns/ashford.json is fully wired. Add any missing building archetypes, NPC blueprints, or interior slots. Ensure all 5 NPCs have complete dialogue pools (3+ greetings, 1+ quest lines). Validate with TownConfigSchema.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 building archetypes (cottage, tavern, smithy, chapel, house_large) have complete interiorSlots
All 5 NPC blueprints have 3+ greeting lines and 1+ quest dialogue
Integration test: load Ashford → layoutTown → generateBuildingGeometry for all 6 buildings

stories.title: Millbrook Town Config
stories.description: Create content/towns/millbrook.json — a market town at anchor-01 (distance 6000). Layout strategy: 'road' (buildings line a main street). 8-10 buildings including tavern, market_stall x3, chapel, guard_post, house_large x2, stable. Boundary: hedge. Approach: bridge.
acceptance_criteria: All building archetypes exist in content/buildings/

stories.title: Ravensgate Town Config
stories.description: Create content/towns/ravensgate.json — a walled hostile town at anchor-03 (distance 17000). Layout strategy: 'grid' (street grid inside stone walls). 12-15 buildings including gate, prison, tavern, barracks, lord's manor, merchant x2, house_large x3, guard_post x2. Boundary: stone_wall. Approach: open.
acceptance_criteria: 12-15 buildings reflecting a hostile walled city
All building archetypes exist in content/buildings/

stories.title: Pilgrim's Rest Waypoint Config
stories.description: Create content/towns/pilgrims-rest.json — a roadside monastery at anchor-04 (distance 21000). Layout strategy: 'organic'. 4-5 buildings: chapel (large), garden structure, library, dormitory, herb_garden. Boundary: hedge. Approach: grove. Peaceful refuge with healer and scholar NPCs.
acceptance_criteria: NPCs include healer and scholar archetypes

stories.title: Building Archetypes — Market & Civic
stories.description: Create building archetype JSONs: market_stall (1 story, 2x1, timber_frame, openFront), guard_post (2 stories, 1x1, stone, flat roof), stable (1 story, 3x2, timber_frame, thatch), barracks (2 stories, 3x3, stone, slate), manor (2 stories, 4x5, stone, slate), prison (2 stories, 2x3, stone, flat).
acceptance_criteria: Each has appropriate interiorSlots for its function

stories.title: Building Archetypes — Religious & Utility
stories.description: Create building archetype JSONs: library (2 stories, 3x3, stone, slate), dormitory (2 stories, 2x4, plaster, thatch), herb_garden (1 story, 2x2, timber_frame, flat, openFront), mill (2 stories, 2x2, stone, thatch), watchtower (3 stories, 1x1, stone, flat).

stories.title: Building Archetypes — Large Structures
stories.description: Create building archetype JSONs: gate (special 1-story 4x1 stone flat archetype with no roof, representing a town gate), temple (2 stories, 4x6, stone, slate — for Grailsend), arena (1 story, 5x5, stone, flat, openFront).
acceptance_criteria: gate and arena have appropriate openFront settings

stories.title: Millbrook NPCs — Blueprints
stories.description: Create 6 NPC blueprints for Millbrook: Martha (innkeeper, warm), Gerold (merchant, shrewd), Brother Thomas (priest, gentle), Captain Hale (knight, stern), Farmer Wynn (farmer, worried about crops), Lucy (wanderer, passing through with news). Each with face, bodyBuild, clothPalette, behavior, dialogue.
acceptance_criteria: Each has 3+ greeting lines and 1+ quest dialogue
Face configs use diverse skinTones, hairStyles, eyeColors

stories.title: Ravensgate NPCs — Blueprints
stories.description: Create 8 NPC blueprints for Ravensgate: Lord Ashwick (noble, antagonist), Captain Roderick (knight, loyal to lord), Elara (healer, secret ally), Thornton (merchant, fearful), Bard Finch (wanderer, information broker), Greta (innkeeper, sympathetic), Guard Marcus (knight, conflicted), Prisoner Silas (scholar, imprisoned quest-giver).
acceptance_criteria: Lord Ashwick and Captain Roderick have antagonistic dialogue
Elara and Greta have secretly sympathetic dialogue

stories.title: Pilgrim's Rest NPCs — Blueprints
stories.description: Create 3 NPC blueprints for Pilgrim's Rest: Abbot Gregorius (priest, wise), Sister Maeve (healer, kind), Brother Anselm (scholar, bookish). Peaceful, contemplative dialogue. Provide lore about the Grail.
acceptance_criteria: Dialogue provides Grail lore and spiritual guidance
Healer NPC has healing-related quest dialogue

stories.title: Grailsend NPCs — Blueprints
stories.description: Create 2 NPC blueprints for the final temple: The Guardian (knight, ancient), The Oracle (scholar, cryptic). These are the final NPCs before the endgame.
acceptance_criteria: Oracle dialogue reveals final Grail truth

stories.title: Roadside NPCs — Wanderers & Hermits
stories.description: Create 8 NPC blueprints for random roadside encounters: 4 wanderer variants (pilgrim, peddler, bard, refugee) and 4 hermit variants (herb_hermit, mad_hermit, retired_knight, wise_woman). These spawn procedurally in WILD chunks.
acceptance_criteria: Each has distinct face, bodyBuild, clothPalette

stories.title: NPC Definition Pools
stories.description: Create content/npcs/pools/ directory with NPC definition pool JSONs (NPCDefinitionSchema) for each archetype: blacksmith.json, innkeeper.json, merchant.json, healer.json, knight.json, farmer.json, priest.json, noble.json, scholar.json, wanderer.json, hermit.json, bandit.json. Each pool has 3+ names and 2+ greetings for procedural NPC generation.
acceptance_criteria: Each has greetingPool with 2+ dialogue lines

stories.title: Main Quest — Chapter 0: The Call (Ashford)
stories.description: Create content/quests/main/chapter-00.json. Macro quest: player discovers a dying pilgrim on the road who speaks of the Holy Grail. Must talk to Old Tomas (scholar) who reveals the legend. Branch A: accept quest eagerly. Branch B: reluctantly agree after village comes under threat. Steps include dialogue, investigation, and a travel step leaving Ashford.
acceptance_criteria: Has both A and B branches

stories.title: Main Quest — Chapter 1: The First Sign (Millbrook)
stories.description: Create content/quests/main/chapter-01.json. Macro quest at Millbrook: investigate rumors of strange lights at the old mill. Meet Captain Hale who's suspicious of outsiders. Branch A: gain trust through helping with bandits. Branch B: sneak into the mill at night. Discover ancient map fragment pointing toward Thornfield.
acceptance_criteria: A and B branches with different approaches
Includes combat or stealth encounter references

stories.title: Main Quest — Chapter 2: The Ruins Speak (Thornfield)
stories.description: Create content/quests/main/chapter-02.json. Macro quest at Thornfield Ruins dungeon: navigate the ruins, solve ancient puzzles, fight guardian creatures. Branch A: use force to break through. Branch B: solve riddles using knowledge from Brother Thomas. Find second map fragment and learn of Ravensgate's role.
acceptance_criteria: Includes puzzle and combat encounter references
A and B branches (force vs knowledge)

stories.title: Main Quest — Chapter 3: The Iron Gate (Ravensgate)
stories.description: Create content/quests/main/chapter-03.json. Macro quest: gain entry to Ravensgate, find imprisoned scholar Silas who holds the third map fragment. Branch A: diplomacy and deception (work with Elara). Branch B: direct confrontation with Lord Ashwick. Escape the city with the fragment.
acceptance_criteria: A and B branches with stealth/social vs combat

stories.title: Main Quest — Chapter 4: The Pilgrim's Wisdom (Pilgrim's Rest)
stories.description: Create content/quests/main/chapter-04.json. Macro quest: at the monastery, assemble the three map fragments. Abbot Gregorius reveals the true nature of the Grail — it's not a cup but a test of character. Branch A: accept the spiritual path. Branch B: demand the Grail's location by force. Prepare for final journey.
acceptance_criteria: A and B branches reflecting moral choice

stories.title: Main Quest — Chapter 5: The Grail (Grailsend)
stories.description: Create content/quests/main/chapter-05.json. Macro quest: the final temple. Face the Guardian's trials. Branch A: pass tests of wisdom, mercy, and sacrifice. Branch B: fight through guardians. Meet the Oracle who reveals the Grail's final secret. Game ending depends on accumulated choices.
acceptance_criteria: A and B branches with different endings

stories.title: Side Quests — Ashford Micro (3 quests)
stories.description: Create 3 micro side quests for Ashford: (1) Aldric's Missing Hammer — fetch quest, find hammer in nearby forest. (2) Bess's Secret Recipe — dialogue chain, gather herbs. (3) Father Cedric's Lost Hymnal — investigate the chapel attic. Each is linear (steps, no branches).
acceptance_criteria: Each has steps array (no branches required for micro)
Reference valid Ashford NPCs and items

stories.title: Side Quests — Millbrook Meso (2 quests)
stories.description: Create 2 meso side quests for Millbrook: (1) The Poisoned Well — investigate illness, A: confront the herbalist, B: trace poison source upstream. (2) The Missing Merchant — a trader vanished on the road, A: track bandits, B: discover the merchant fled debts.

stories.title: Side Quests — Roadside Micro (5 quests)
stories.description: Create 5 roadside micro side quests triggered by distance: (1) Lost Pilgrim — escort to nearest town. (2) Bandit Ambush — combat encounter. (3) Wounded Soldier — heal or loot dilemma. (4) Merchant's Broken Cart — help repair. (5) Strange Shrine — investigate mysterious glow.
acceptance_criteria: Each trigger type 'roadside' with appropriate distanceRange
Spread across different distance ranges of the road

stories.title: Side Quests — Ravensgate Meso (2 quests)
stories.description: Create 2 meso side quests for Ravensgate: (1) The Underground — find the resistance movement, A: join openly, B: infiltrate as spy. (2) Lord Ashwick's Secret — discover what the lord hides in the tower, A: bribe guards, B: find secret passage.

stories.title: Side Quests — Cross-Region Macro (2 quests)
stories.description: Create 2 macro side quests spanning multiple anchors: (1) The Herbalist's Journey — gather 5 rare herbs from different regions, unlock healer abilities. (2) The Cartographer's Map — complete the world map by visiting all anchors, reveal hidden locations.

stories.title: Side Quests — Pilgrim's Rest Micro (2 quests)
stories.description: Create 2 micro side quests for Pilgrim's Rest: (1) The Missing Manuscript — help Brother Anselm find a stolen book in the library. (2) Sister Maeve's Garden — gather specific herbs from the surrounding hills.

stories.title: Side Quests — Roadside Encounters Meso (3 quests)
stories.description: Create 3 meso roadside quests: (1) The Deserter — a soldier wants help escaping his post, A: help him, B: turn him in. (2) The Cursed Ring — a peddler sells you a ring that brings bad luck, A: find the witch, B: destroy it. (3) The Bridge Troll — a troll blocks passage, A: fight, B: solve riddle.

stories.title: Monster Archetypes — Tier 1 (Common)
stories.description: Create 5 monster archetype JSONs for danger tier 1: wolf (quadruped), bandit (biped), giant_rat (quadruped), skeleton (biped), slime (amorphous). Low health, low damage. Found near the road.
acceptance_criteria: Each has a colorScheme with primary + secondary

stories.title: Monster Archetypes — Tier 2 (Uncommon)
stories.description: Create 5 monster archetypes for danger tier 2: dire_wolf (quadruped), bandit_leader (biped), giant_spider (quadruped), wraith (amorphous), troll (biped). Medium health and damage. Found 1-2 chunks from road.

stories.title: Monster Archetypes — Tier 3-4 (Rare & Boss)
stories.description: Create 6 monster archetypes: Tier 3 — drake (quadruped), necromancer (biped), basilisk (serpent). Tier 4 — dragon (quadruped, size 4.0), lich_lord (biped), ancient_horror (amorphous, size 5.0). High health/damage. Deep wilderness and dungeons only.
acceptance_criteria: dragon and ancient_horror use large sizes (4.0-5.0)

stories.title: Encounter Tables — All Tiers
stories.description: Create encounter table JSONs for each danger tier (0-4): content/encounters/tier-0.json through tier-4.json. Each table has weighted monster entries with count ranges. Tier 0 (road) has no combat. Tier 1-4 have escalating monster pools.
acceptance_criteria: Higher tiers reference corresponding monster archetypes
Weight values sum to approximately 1.0 per table
Each tier references a loot table

stories.title: Items — Core Equipment & Quest Items
stories.description: Create 20 item definition JSONs in content/items/: 5 equipment (iron_sword, leather_armor, wooden_shield, healing_staff, travel_cloak), 5 consumables (health_potion, stamina_draught, antidote, ration, torch), 5 key_items (map_fragment_1/2/3, pilgrim_medallion, grail_key), 5 quest_items (aldrics_hammer, secret_recipe, lost_hymnal, stolen_manuscript, rare_herb).
acceptance_criteria: Quest items reference their associated quest IDs in description

stories.title: Loot Tables — All Tiers
stories.description: Create loot table JSONs for each danger tier: content/loot/tier-1.json through tier-4.json. Each table has weighted item drops with quantity ranges. Higher tiers drop better equipment.
acceptance_criteria: Tier 1 drops: rations, torches, small coins
Tier 2 drops: health potions, basic equipment
Tier 4 drops: unique items, key items
Item IDs reference valid items from S032

stories.title: Roadside Features — Ambient (10 features)
stories.description: Create 10 ambient feature definitions: wildflower_patch, ancient_oak, standing_stone, bird_nest, fox_den, mushroom_ring, fallen_log, stream_crossing, berry_bush, wind_chimes. Non-interactable visual flavor along the road.

stories.title: Roadside Features — Minor (10 features)
stories.description: Create 10 minor features: wayside_shrine, stone_bridge, abandoned_camp, milestone_marker, old_well, ruined_farmstead, crossroads_sign, hunter_blind, fairy_circle, weather_vane. Interactable with short dialogue/description.
acceptance_criteria: Visual types map to renderable objects

stories.title: Roadside Features — Major (5 features)
stories.description: Create 5 major features: ancient_ruins (dungeon entrance), dragon_bones (lore marker), hermit_cave (NPC encounter), enchanted_grove (healing spot), watchtower_ruin (vantage point). Significant gameplay impact.

stories.title: Encounter Definitions — Combat (6 encounters)
stories.description: Create 6 combat encounter definitions: bandit_ambush (difficulty 3), wolf_pack (difficulty 4), skeleton_patrol (difficulty 5), troll_bridge (difficulty 6), spider_nest (difficulty 7), dragon_lair (difficulty 10). Each with description, rewards, and failure consequences.
acceptance_criteria: Each has rewards referencing valid items

stories.title: Encounter Definitions — Social & Puzzle (6 encounters)
stories.description: Create 6 non-combat encounters: merchant_negotiation (social, diff 3), tavern_brawl (social, diff 4), riddle_door (puzzle, diff 5), ancient_lock (puzzle, diff 6), noble_court (social, diff 7), oracle_trial (puzzle, diff 8).
acceptance_criteria: Each has rewards and failure consequences

stories.title: Encounter Definitions — Stealth & Survival (4 encounters)
stories.description: Create 4 encounters: prison_break (stealth, diff 6), guard_evasion (stealth, diff 5), wilderness_storm (survival, diff 4), river_crossing (survival, diff 3).
acceptance_criteria: Each has rewards and failure consequences

stories.title: Thornfield Ruins Dungeon Layout
stories.description: Create content/dungeons/thornfield.json defining the dungeon at anchor-02. Multiple rooms connected by corridors, puzzle chambers, a boss arena. Reference encounter IDs and loot tables. Include trap placements and secret passages.
acceptance_criteria: Includes at least 1 puzzle room, 1 boss room, 2 trap corridors

stories.title: Grailsend Temple Dungeon Layout
stories.description: Create content/dungeons/grailsend.json defining the final temple at anchor-05. Three trial chambers (wisdom, mercy, sacrifice), a guardian arena, the Grail chamber. The most complex dungeon layout.
acceptance_criteria: Three distinct trial chambers with different encounter types
Guardian arena with boss encounter reference

stories.title: Road Spine Regions
stories.description: Add regions array to content/world/road-spine.json. Define 5 regions: Ashford Meadows (MEADOW, anchors home→anchor-01), Millbrook Forests (FOREST, anchor-01→anchor-02), Thornfield Hills (HILLS, anchor-02→anchor-03), Ravensgate Moors (MOOR, anchor-03→anchor-04), Grailsend Highlands (HILLS, anchor-04→anchor-05). Each with terrainFeatures.
acceptance_criteria: Regions cover the full road with no gaps

stories.title: Town Config Loader — Expand for All Towns
stories.description: Update src/game/world/town-configs.ts to import and register all town configs (Millbrook at anchor-01 chunk, Ravensgate at anchor-03 chunk, Pilgrim's Rest at anchor-04 chunk). Map anchor IDs to chunk coordinates based on road distances and CHUNK_SIZE.
acceptance_criteria: getTownConfig returns correct config for each town's chunk coordinates
All new building archetypes registered in BUILDING_ARCHETYPES
All new NPC blueprints registered in NPC_BLUEPRINTS
Integration tests verify all towns load and layout correctly

stories.title: Game Config Assembly
stories.description: Create content/game-config.json assembling all content: world (road-spine with regions), pacing config, main quest chapters, all side quests (macro/meso/micro), NPC pools, feature definitions, item definitions, encounter definitions. Validate against GameConfigSchema.
acceptance_criteria: All NPC/item/encounter references are valid cross-references

stories.title: Content Validation Script
stories.description: Create scripts/validate-content.ts that loads all content JSON files, validates each against its Zod schema, checks cross-references (item IDs referenced in quests exist, NPC IDs in towns exist, encounter IDs in quests exist), and reports errors.
acceptance_criteria: Validates all content directories: buildings, towns, npcs, quests, monsters, encounters, items, features, loot, dungeons
Cross-reference checking for all ID references
Reports clear error messages with file paths
Exit code 0 when all valid, 1 when errors found
Can be run via 'npx tsx scripts/validate-content.ts'

stories.title: Monster Factory — Runtime Rendering
stories.description: Create src/game/factories/monster-factory.ts that takes a MonsterArchetype and produces render data (geometry dimensions, color materials, animation parameters). Create src/game/components/Monster.tsx R3F component. Similar pattern to NPC factory but for hostile entities.
acceptance_criteria: Monster.tsx R3F component renders from archetype
bodyType determines base geometry (biped=box stack, quadruped=elongated, serpent=cylinders, amorphous=sphere)
size parameter scales the entire model

stories.title: Encounter System — Runtime
stories.description: Create src/game/systems/EncounterSystem.tsx that checks player position against danger tier, rolls encounter tables, and spawns monster groups. Integrate with ChunkManager to add encounter zones to chunks based on danger tier.
acceptance_criteria: Uses getDangerTier() to determine encounter probability
Rolls against encounter tables to select monsters
Spawns Monster components at appropriate positions

stories.title: Quest System — Runtime State Machine
stories.description: Create src/game/systems/QuestSystem.tsx and src/game/stores/questStore.ts. Track active quests, current step, branch choices. Trigger quest steps based on player location (anchor proximity) and NPC dialogue. Display quest log in HUD.
acceptance_criteria: questStore.ts manages active quests, completed quests, current steps
Anchor triggers fire when player enters anchor town chunk
Roadside triggers fire based on distance from start
Quest state persists across chunk loads

stories.title: Feature Spawner — Roadside Features
stories.description: Create src/game/systems/FeatureSpawner.tsx that procedurally places roadside features along ROAD and WILD chunks based on pacing intervals. Uses feature definitions to select appropriate tier features.
acceptance_criteria: Feature components render with appropriate geometry
Interactable features create Interactable entries for interaction system

stories.title: Integration Test — Full Game Config Validation
stories.description: Create comprehensive integration test that loads game-config.json and validates the entire content graph: all cross-references resolve, pacing intervals are sane, quest chains are completable, every anchor has content, no orphaned items/encounters.
acceptance_criteria: Loads and validates game-config.json against GameConfigSchema
Verifies all item IDs referenced in quests/loot exist
Verifies all NPC references in quests/towns exist
Verifies quest dependency chains are acyclic
Verifies every anchor has at least one quest
